name: acme-first-light-week

messaging_goals.2099-04-10: First Light Week: name the one object a brand-new owner can find on their first clear night. No discount language; the payoff is the object, not a sale.

voice_notes: Keep the low drama dial. The campaign celebrates a beginner's first real object, not a promotion. Every claim stays verifiable at the eyepiece.
success_signals: Replies describing a first object found; saves of the 'tonight' card. Watch reply sentiment over raw reach.
